narrative:
Florence Twp township has 1,850 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
